help.overview: The Countries menu filters the catalog by country of origin. Every country with at least one object is listed with its flag and an object count; selecting one highlights all of that country's satellites and loads them into the search results.
help.imgAlt: The Countries menu listing countries with flags and satellite counts
help.imgCaption: Each entry shows the flag, country name, and how many objects it owns.
help.howToUse:
1. Open the Countries menu from the bottom bar or press O.
  2. Click a country. Its satellites are grouped, highlighted in the 3D view, and listed in the search bar results.
  3. Click any search result to inspect an individual satellite.
help.tip1: Selecting a country replaces the current search and deselects the current satellite, so finish object level work first.
help.tip2: Each country is also available from the command palette as a Select Country command.
